mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_entry_apply WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND DATE_FORMAT(entry_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_resign_apply WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND DATE_FORMAT(resign_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT u.org_id AS deptId, COALESCE(o.org_name, '未分配') AS deptName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON u.org_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY u.org_id, o.org_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT u.post_id AS postId, COALESCE(p.post_name, '未分配') AS postName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_post p ON u.post_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY u.post_id, p.post_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.created_at, CURDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1年' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.created_at, CURDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3年' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.created_at, CURDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5年' ELSE '5年以上' END AS `range`, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_user u WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY `range` ORDER BY FIELD(`range`, '0-1年', '1-3年', '3-5年', '5年以上')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(entry_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS entryCount, 0 AS resignCount FROM biz_entry_apply WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND entry_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(entry_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(resign_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, 0 AS entryCount, COUNT(*) AS resignCount FROM biz_resign_apply WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND resign_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(resign_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
